opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I go to the toilet it feels like I'm passing broken glass, and then there's this deep throbbing that lasts for hours afterwards. There's a bit of bright red blood on the paper too. I'm honestly terrified to go now.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has been going for three days since I passed a big hard stool, and it's so bad afterwards that I've been holding on and not going, which is making me really anxious.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 days ago, straight after passing a large, hard stool when I was constipated
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days, same pattern each time I go
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp tearing, cut-like pain as the stool passes, then it turns into an intense burning and throbbing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the passing bit is unbearable and the throbbing afterwards lasts about 2 to 3 hours
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right at the back passage / the opening
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: only with and after a bowel motion; settles between motions
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much yet — warm helps a little; the paracetamol I've tried barely touches it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: passing a stool, and it's worse because the stools have been hard
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a small amount of bright red blood on the toilet paper; I feel like I can't sit down properly
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sit directly on my bottom and I'm walking around carefully; I'm scared to open my bowels

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an over-the-counter codeine painkiller (I've since stopped it)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: was taking an over-the-counter codeine-based painkiller recently, which seemed to bind me up beforehand

objective_data_offered.value: I checked my temperature at home and it was normal — I don't feel feverish
only a small streak of bright red blood on the toilet paper, none mixed through the stool and nothing dark or tarry in the bowl
I can't feel any lump or swelling around the back passage, and there's no swelling or redness I can see
